title: Startup Refugees | Helsinki
bio: Startup Refugees, Helsinki. 5,752 likes | 62 talking about this | 11 were here. Supporting refugees, asylum seekers, and immigrants in employment &...
intro: Supporting refugees, asylum seekers, and immigrants in employment & entrepreneurship.
ad_status: This Page isn't currently running ads.

posts.text:
This week is over but the work is not 📣✨

Anti-Racism Week may be wrapping up, but the work doesn’t come with an end date. It lives in the everyday choices we make, the spaces we create and the conversations we keep having. 

In both Helsinki and Oulu, we opened our doors for people to drop by, hang out and talk about anything on their minds. Because having a place where people can come as they are, ask questions, share thoughts or just sit and be, is kind of the whole point. ✌️

In Oulu, we also gathered for a beautiful iftar, and if there’s one thing that never fails, it’s how food brings people together. A big thank you to our sponsors ✨S-ryhmä / Osuuskauppa Arina, Hagia Sofia Restaurant, Pizzeria Da Mario, Samba Café - Brazilian Coffee , Taibah Market, and Sham Itämaan Herkku✨ for making sure the evening went smoothly! Also, so lucky to have Fatema Jannat join us and create stunning henna, adding an extra layer of culture and creativity to the evening. 🎨

And in Rovaniemi, together with International Rovaniemi and the Rovaniemen kaupunki - City of Rovaniemi we hosted a season-end evening for seasonal workers. Good conversations, company and just the right amount of snacks to keep people around a little longer than planned. 🍕

Thanks to everyone who showed up and contributed. Let's keep doing the things that actually move us forward! 🫵

We will leave you on a very festive note - Happy Eid & Happy Nowruz to those celebrating! May these celebrations bring peace and joy to your days  ✨

***
📸: Adelina Chachanidze 
#StartupRefugees #AntiRacismWeek

Jumping on a trend here! 😙👌

You have probably seen our Meet the Team posts by now, but here’s a deeper look at the cuties behind the screens.

Our team is made up of people from many different backgrounds and not all paths have been straightforward. As kids, none of us imagined we would end up in the situations or places we find ourselves in today and those experiences have shaped who we are, how we see the world and how we show up for others. ✊

Diversity is something we value deeply. It’s not just about where we come from, but the different perspectives, strengths and stories we bring into our work every day! 
We are proud of the journey that brought us all here, and even more proud to be building something together 🫶

Different stories, different paths but one team and bunch of cute kiddos! I mean please look at us 🥹✨

***
#startuprefugees #antiracismweek

2025 was not a quiet year, alright! 📣

We turned 10, which feels both impressive and slightly unreal. A full decade of this important work, this community, these amazing people and yes, a bit of a rollercoaster along the way. 🎂

Because it hasn’t been easy. The environment shifted, policies changed, funding got tighter and the whole landscape around employment and inclusion became more complicated for everyone. But here we are. Still standing, still building and ready to do the work! 

And if there is one thing ten years has made very clear, it is this: employment creates stability, confidence, and long term belonging. That’s a fact. It is not just about money but about having a place, a role and a reason to show up. The chance to be part of something bigger and feel belonging! Who wouldn’t want to feel home?! 

We launched our Impact Calculator to show what this work actually means in real terms. We celebrated 10 years of our people and everything built together. And we did our job the best way we know how ✌️

Because when the right support meets the right people, things move! So if you are wondering what our 2025 looked like in practice, you can see for yourself ;) 
➡️ https://startuprefugees.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/ACTION-REPORT-2025.pdf
***
📸: Iiro Immonen 
#StartupRefugees

Anti-Racism Week is here ✊

Honestly, in an ideal world we wouldn’t need a whole week to remind people that equality is not optional. But since we do, at Startup Refugees this is something we work towards every single day! 

The whole point is that everyone deserves equal treatment regardless of where they are from, what they look like, what they believe, or the language they speak. The list could go on forever and frankly all of this is not rocket science. 🙄 But as long as we need a reminder: we are here loud, proud and ready to scream from the rooftops that racism has no place in this world 📣

This week, we have a few activities across Helsinki, Oulu and Rovaniemi to create a safe space for conversations and community in the spirit of the week: 

✨Oulu✨
The Oulu office has open doors this week. Come for coffee or tea, chat about professional life in Finland, discuss anti-racism and drop your thoughts on our post-it note wall! 
🗓️ Monday 16th to Friday 20th March
🕔 14:00 to 19:00
📍 Saaristonkatu 23 to 25
___

✨Helsinki✨
Our Helsinki office is opening its doors for a day! Drop by to have coffee, tea and actually good discussions. Also, a post-it note wall is waiting for you to share your thoughts 🫶 
🗓️ Tuesday 17th March
🕔 14:00 to 16:00
📍 Sturenkatu 4, Helsingin Kulttuuritalo
___

✨Rovaniemi✨
Together with International Rovaniemi and the City of Rovaniemi are hosting a season-end evening for seasonal workers! Join us for great discussions, good company and snacks. Rumor has it there will be homemade pizza 😉
🗓️ Wednesday 18th March
🕔 17:00 to 19:00
📍 Valtakatu 16, 1st floor

***
📸: Nora Sayyad & Adelina El Yadini
hashtag#StartupRefugees hashtag#AntiRacism

Got that entrepreneur energy? You might want to keep reading 🫵 

Registration is now open for the Startup Refugees Crash Course to Entrepreneurship 2026 in English. This free online training, taking place from 7–28 April, is made for exactly those who are interested in entrepreneurship but also balancing work, studies and everyday life. 😉✨

🗓 When: Tuesday evenings, 17:00–20:00 online 
⏰ Workload: Around 15–20 hours in total
💡 What you will learn:
• The basics of starting and running a business in Finland
• How the Finnish startup world actually works
• How to build your entrepreneurial mindset (yes, that’s a real thing!)

If you are a migrant living in Finland and curious about entrepreneurship, you are more than welcome to join! Check and apply here by 31st of March ➡️ 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfXQKIEE5YrI7rybs0p6ZQXee5c6MFzAo6rvu7wvf2S5n7r4w/viewform

Happy ‘almost’ women’s day! 💖

Yea yea, you probably already know the numbers but in case you don’t: female founders in Finland get about six percent of all startup funding. Migrant women founders get almost nothing.

And yet these women are out here building businesses, mentoring each other, creating opportunities for one another and making the impossible look like a casual Tuesday. You are bold, brilliant and determined all at once 🫵

Now, we want to be part of the change with our 2026 Fund and that’s why we are so excited to be collaborating with Asha Singadia and the community of entrepreneurial women and girls that she had built – The Foundher Table and The Women Of Colour Table.

Asha has built a space where women entrepreneurs and founders actually talk, share real advice and push each other forward. Working together means we not only get more women at the table but also start turning those grim funding numbers up! As a female founder herself, she is on a mission to build one of Europe’s largest fund’s for under-represented women. 💪 Change needs to be made! 

So to all the migrant women founders, entrepreneurs, mentors and changemakers: keep building, keep showing up and keep proving that a lack of numbers is never a lack of talent. 💐✨

And if YOU want to make more of this possible, the room is ready for collaborators, please get in touch to make it happen. 📧
***
#StartupRefugees

Come have a chat with Startup Refugees ☕️✨

In a world where we could all use a little more love, understanding and support it can feel especially discouraging right now with how racism still shows up in Finland. That is why we are doing our part and opening our doors for Anti-Racism Week to create a space where people can connect, share and get support. 💛

Drop by our office in Helsinki for coffee, conversation and a chance to talk about employment, entrepreneurship and training possibilities. Or just life and work in Finland. No pressure, no speeches, just real conversations with Startup Refugees’ peops who genuinely want to help.

🗓 Tuesday 17 March
🕑 14.00 to 16.00
📍 Sturenkatu 4, 4th floor 

Come hang out, chat about life or work or just sip some coffee while we all figure things out together. There will be friendly faces and helpful tips with some coffee and tea on the side! ✨

***
📸: Nora Sayyad
#StartupRefugees

Did someone say Hack Day? 🤓

Applications for Talent Hack Day 2026 are officially open and yes this is your sign to do something cool this March. Are you curious about real business challenges? Enjoy working in diverse teams? Want to level up your pitching skills? Then newsflash, this is your thing. 🫵

The two day Talent Hack Day is happening on 5 to 6 March 2026 at Startup Runway, Vantaa. The event is in English and facilitated by yours truly Startup Refugees, with mentors from Business Vantaa and the participating companies.

Who can apply?
☑️ University and university of applied sciences students
☑️ Recent graduates
☑️ Job seekers with a higher education degree

Apply by February 24, 2026 or sooner if the spots fill up. Before you hit submit, check out the challenges on the Hack Day website and pick the one that sparks your interest ➡️ https://business.vantaa.fi/en/talent-hack-day-2026

***
#StartupRefugees #Hackathon #Vantaa

Meet the team! 🫶 Say hi to our Tsemppari Coach Farida Bourdache from the Vantaa office. Originally from Algeria, Farida has a diverse background in international trade, social and health care, and helping people in vulnerable situations. 💫

🎙️ What brought you to Startup Refugees?
– I first got involved because I wanted to support newcomers in Finland, helping them navigate career paths and opportunities. Joining a community that aligns with my values of inclusion and empowerment felt natural.

🎙️ What do you do?
– I work as a Career Coach, guiding newcomers and refugees in their professional development. I help them explore career options, improve their skills, and build confidence to succeed in Finland’s job market. I’m also studying a Specialized Vocational Qualification in rehabilitation, support, and guidance at Omnia.

🎙️ Why is your work important?
– My work matters because it gives people the tools and support they need to thrive in a new environment. It’s not just about jobs but about dignity, independence, and helping people feel they belong.

🎙️ What do you love about your work?
– I love seeing people grow and gain confidence. When someone takes the first step toward their dream career or realizes their potential, it’s incredibly rewarding.

🎙️ Most memorable thing that has happened at work so far?
– One of the most memorable moments was helping a young family at a reception center for asylum seekers. They were scared and unsure of everything, and being able to help them feel safe and connected reminded me why I love this work! It was a small moment with a huge impact.

🎙️ What is your superpower?
– Empathy and staying calm under pressure. I’m good at bringing order to chaos and finding solutions when things feel overwhelming. Plus, as an Aquarius, I love thinking outside the box and seeing possibilities where others might not.

🎙️ How do you unwind? Any hobbies or favorite ways to recharge?
– I love reading, cooking, and spending time in nature. Especially camping, which helps me completely reset. I enjoy traveling, exploring new cultures, and learning languages. I’m active in sports and creative hobbies like home decoration and baking (and my friends never complain).

🎙️ Three facts about you that people might not know:
1️⃣ I practiced parkour as a kid. Jumping all over my neighborhood (and even balconies!).
2️⃣ I write poems in many languages and even rap songs.
3️⃣ I have a habit of driving in circles, literally! 😄

So if you ever need a creative solution, a good laugh, or a pastry recipe, Farida is your go-to person! 🍰✨

***
#StartupRefugees #CareerCoach

No shade, no tea 🫖

Do not get us wrong, career fairs are important. But let's get honest, real employment opportunities for young people matter just as much! 

Too often, young people show up ready to work and build their future, only to face unrealistic requirements, years of experience for entry level roles or companies that are truly not hiring. 🙃

Young people deserve real opportunities, guidance and a fair chance to enter the workforce. I mean how else is anyone going to make a career out there or participate in society?! 

And that is why our ✨From Dreams to Career Paths Program✨ is for anyone aged 15 to 29 in Oulu & Kuusamo area. It supports young peops, especially those with refugee and migrant backgrounds. Through career guidance, workshops and direct connections with employers. Also, to identify strengths, explore career paths and access real opportunities in education and employment. 💪

Because EVERYONE deserves the chance to grow! Apply for the program here → https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdsQhBx-QyYYl9YclffVBOCGpCMc8vUvH1ywSisOm0X6atzKg/viewform?fbzx=6231631588925940604

In Finland, female founders receive about 6 percent of all startup funding. Migrant women founders receive close to zero. Yes, zero. And no, we did not forget any digits. 😬

We decided those ''odds'' are unacceptable, so in 2026 Startup Refugees Fund is fully dedicated to female migrant entrepreneurs. Talent is evenly distributed but funding clearly is not. 

The Startup Refugees Fund is the only fund in Finland dedicated to backing underrepresented refugee and migrant founders with seed funding, mentoring and networks that open doors instead of just sending newsletters. 🪄✨

If you have ever wanted your effort to be more than a like button, now is perfect timing. BECAUSE we are looking for partners for the Lead and Early Stage categories! Your contribution will go 100% directly to seed funding, mentoring, and founder support. 🫶

More info and how to reach out to us can be found here: https://startuprefugees.com/fund/

Ps. We are also looking for an event sponsor with a space to host. Chairs, walls, and a roof are considered strong pluses. 🙂‍↕️🫰

***
📸: Miikka Pirinen 
#StartupRefugees #entrepreneurship #femalefounders

We did a thing with UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency and it is a pretty big one 🤝

Together we launched the Refugee Friendly Employer pledge. It is a real commitment to turning refugee inclusion into everyday workplace reality. The kind with structures, leadership accountability and measurable actions. Not just nice words but real frameworks! 

🎉 Big congratulations to IKEA, StaffPoint, Bolt.Works Oy, Claned, UBSolar Finland and Ekovilla. Elämänlämpöä. for making it through the first round of the Refugee Friendly Employer program!🎉 Each one went through a careful evaluation and committed to concrete actions for the year ahead. We are talking things from paid language learning during work hours, inclusive and trauma aware leadership. As well as real career pathways. 

Why does this matter? Because hiring refugees is not charity nor a side project. It brings international expertise, fresh perspectives and the skills needed to drive real impact in companies across Europe. With the right support in place, people do not just get jobs. They build careers and help organizations and societies grow and flourish. 🪄✨

Over the coming months we will be diving into what this actually looks like in practice. What companies promised, what they are building, what works, what others can copy without shame, and yes, we will bring examples and receipts. 😏✨

Stay tuned for a deep dive into all of this & meanwhile read more ➡️ https://www.unhcr.org/europe/news/press-releases/refugee-friendly-employers-2026

***
#StartupRefugees #UNHCR #RefugeeFriendlyEmployer

Meet the team! 🫶 Say hi to our new Career Coach in Oulu, supporting English and Russian-speaking clients! Adelina Chachanidze was born in Georgia and grew up in Russia. She moved to Finland in 2018 to study Chemical Engineering but later found her way into digital marketing, content creation and community work. When she is not coaching, you will probably find her watching films, exploring art, or working on creative projects. 🎬

🎙️ What brought you to Startup Refugees?
– About three years ago I applied for a coach role. I didn’t get it then, but joined Match and later was invited to become a Community Leader. Since then I’ve taken part in many projects from Match clinics to creative programs.

🎙️ What do you do?
– I work as a Career Coach in Oulu for English and Russian speaking clients.

🎙️ What do you enjoy particularly about your work?
– The people and the work culture around me.

🎙️ Most memorable moment at work?
– Helping organize the RISE program pikkujoulu and turning a simple spreadsheet into a handmade map collage that is still in the office. Also filming promo videos and photographing RISE sessions.

🎙️ What is your superpower?
– Explaining complex topics in a simple and easy to follow way.

🎙️ Three facts about you that people might not know:
1️⃣ I’m quite introverted.
2️⃣ I’m organized and disorganized at the same time.
3️⃣ My resting face looks serious but I’m friendly 😄

If you ever need a match in a board game or a good recommendation on indie video games, then Adelina is your go-to person 🎮

***
#StartupRefugees

PUBLIC SERVICE ANNOUNCEMENT 📣 Startup Refugees: From Arrival to Belonging exhibition has landed in Oulu!

The exhibition invites you to step into the lives of people who came to Finland as refugees or asylum seekers and see how they have shaped our communities. 🎥✨ This exhibition began as part of our 10th anniversary, but these stories are far from over. You will find it at Kauppakeskus Valkea till 31st of March, on the 2nd floor right next to the elevators. 

Some arrived from the Middle East in 2015, some from Ukraine in 2022. Each journey is different. Each story carries moments of fear and hope, confusion and courage, struggle and triumphs. The portraits and personal stories let you witness what it is to start over and how to find a place where you belong. They also show the beautiful ways these individuals have made Finland stronger, more vibrant and more connected through their skills, presence and contributions.

The stories remind us that belonging is not a finish line. It is built day by day, through human connection, persistence and shared care for one another. ❤️

Come and see the exhibition for yourself and step into these stories! 
***
📸: Portraits by Nora Sayyad
📸 Other photography: Jussi Hellsten, Julius Töyrylä, Iiro Immonen, Miikka Pirinen, and Nora Sayyad

ANOTHER opportunity? Yes but this time in Kalajoki🎣✨

If your feed is full of sign-ups right now? Great because one more won’t hurt! 
On February 5th, we are hosting a free entrepreneurship workshop in Kalajoki for migrants who are building a new life in Finland and want to turn ideas into a business’. 

We will give you a clear overview of how to start a business in Finland, explain the legal requirements, permits and registrations you need. AND share practical tips to make your idea a flourishing business. 🤝

This workshop is for you if you have a business idea you keep thinking about, if you are thinking about working for yourself, if you already run a small business and want to grow, or if you are just curious about entrepreneurship in Finland. No special background is needed, just bring your curiosity and motivation. 💛

📅 Thursday 5th of February 2026
🕔 17:00–20:00
💸 Free of charge
📍 Kalajoki
💬: English & Russian 

Sign up here and give January one more win: https://forms.gle/wEYYdKRgEdQfxzkr5

🤝: in collaboration with Startup Refugees, NIHAK (VAU!START+), Pohjois-Pohjanmaan liitto – Council of Oulu Region, Kalajoen kaupunki - City of Kalajoki, Koulutuskeskus JEDU, ELY-keskus - Centre for Economic Development, Transport and the Environment, Kalajoen Kristillinen Opisto & Duuniportti

#StartupRefugees

Attention attention entrepreneurs 📣✨ 

Ready to take your business from ’’hmm’’ to ’’heck yeah?’’ The Startup Refugees Growth Program 2026 in collaboration with Kasvu Open is officially open for applications. Think of it as a personal trainer for your business, minus the sweat and questionable gym playlists. 🏃‍♀️‍➡️🏃‍➡️

The program runs from 12th of February 2026 to 26 November 2026. And over those nine months, you will get expert coaching, mentoring from people who actually know what they are doing and a chance to meet fellow entrepreneurs who get why you would be up at 3am brainstorming ideas. ☁️✨

Eligibility check: You are an immigrant entrepreneur in Finland, your business is registered, you are ready to invest your brain and your time into serious growth.
Important dates include online coaching sessions, sparring days with industry pros and the KasvuOpen Carnival because even entrepreneurs deserve a party. Most sessions are in English, so no stress if Finnish is still a mystery to you. 🪄

Apply by 8th of February and read more from here ➡️ https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSczj4_9EmGf1_JwVe5e6Ljn5uyYg-cnUVFsJ5bYnzvUSkAHDA/viewform

***

#StartupRefugees #KasvuOpen

What started 10 years ago as a media campaign has grown into a family of thousands. Talented customers, supportive partners and network members. 

It is all thanks to you. Here is to growing, laughing and making an even bigger impact in the years to come 🥳

title: Investment & business in Algeria
bio: Investment & business in Algeria. 295 likes. Best Way to invest and doing business in algeria
intro: Best Way to invest and doing business in algeria
ad_status: This Page isn't currently running ads.

posts.text:
Best Markets in Algeria
– Hydrocarbons – Oil and Gas: Algeria is one of the world’s top ten producers of both oil and natural gas.  Existing upstream and midstream infrastructure is aging and inadequate to meet Algeria’s near-term production goals.  We expect new investment in these areas, particularly as new undersea gas pipelines to Europe are constructed as well as investment in offshore exploration. In addition to the existing traditional fuels, Algeria has the world’s third largest reserves of recoverable shale gas resources (19.8 trillion m3) spread in 7 regions throughout the Sahara. A new hydrocarbon law was enacted in March 2013 to encourage foreign investments in unconventional gas exploration and exploitation. To meet the increasing growth in domestic consumption, Algeria is planning to invest USD 120 billion by 2030 in renewable energies.

– Information and Communications Technology:  Algerians are increasingly tech-savvy and interested in technology and know-how transfer in the Information and Communications Technology (ICT) sector.  Government ministries are also interested in process modernization and digitization of recordkeeping.  Home Internet penetration rates remain below 10 percent, but business Internet usage is estimated at over 40 percent.  Mobile phones (GSM) are common, and Algeria is looking toward third-generation technology.

– Public Works, Infrastructure Development and Water Resources: The government has simultaneously focused on roadways, rail systems, airport upgrades, public housing, hospital construction, water treatment, transportation, and electrification as part of a USD286 billion infrastructure development program.  U.S. firms have not capitalized on these opportunities, in part due to the Algerian government bureaucracy.  The Algerian government has recently sought U.S. Embassy assistance in attracting more U.S. firms to the market.  In response to the housing shortage, the Algerian government has allotted USD 47 billion in order to build 1 million homes by 2014.

– Healthcare: Despite the ban on importation of pharmaceuticals that can be produced domestically, the healthcare sector continues to be a relatively attractive market. Demand for medical equipment and disposals is considerable and depends largely on imported goods. The population’s standard of living is improving, albeit slowly.  There has been an increased incidence in reporting of hypertension, diabetes, respiratory and cardiovascular diseases, and allergies.  Contact your local U.S. Export Assistance Center for advice and support on exporting to Algeria.

Looking for a #business_idea? Stop googling “#business_ideas” and start mastering the process of idea generation itself.

One of the best ways to generate a consistent flow of new ideas is to approach it from as many different angles as you can think of.

Need some inspiration? Here is a list of different angles including specific idea generation strategies for each one to get your creative juices flowing!

Scratch your Own Itch

Create a solution for something that you find really annoying or painful in your life.

Create a better solution for something that you do every day — e.g. make the process more efficient, less expensive or more enjoyable.

Solve a Problem for a Niche Audience

3. Build an email list around a niche topic and survey them about their biggest challenges about it.

4. Analyse the activity in niche forums and on platforms like Quora and Reddit to discover the pain points and desires of niche groups.

Discover Business Ideas in your Corporate Job

5. Look at the internal processes of the company you are working for (Human Resources, Finance & Accounting, Marketing, Management, Sales, etc.): What are processes that could be made more efficient? How could they be improved with the use of technology?

6. Look at the people working with you: How could they get better at what they do? How could they be happier at what they do so the company can keep their best-performing employees?

7. Look for improvement potential of the company’s core service. How could its product or service be made better, cheaper or more efficient? Think of out-of-the-box ways that the big companies are missing as well as business ideas that benefit from small agile startup teams instead of big capital and resources.

8. Look at transferability of its products and processes: How could its processes be used in a different industry? How could its products be made accessible to a completely different market (e.g. a cheaper, more basic version in third world countries)?

9. Look for improvement potential in its supply chain: How could processes of its suppliers or customers be made more efficient?

Analyse Trends

10. Look at the trending topics on Social Media Sites like Twitter, Reddit, Buzzfeed, YouTube etc. Remember the Fidget Spinner? If you are able to jump onto trending topics fast enough by creating or reselling related products or services, you can build a valid business.

11. Become a trend spotter yourself: Read, read, read. Pick an industry and spend a couple of months reading everything about it. Do it until you get to the point where you are able to spot and predict upcoming trends yourself.

Explore your Passion

12. Look at your past jobs and analyse what you liked/did not like in your role. Think of industries and types of businesses that would allow you to do more of what you like. For example, if you loved working with people in your customer service job, why not build a coaching or consulting business?

13. Make a list of things you love to do and would do for free. Think about how you could turn these things into a business. For example, if you are passionate about healthy living and spend your free time researching recipes, finding new ways to workout and read up on the newest health trends — why not start a blog or coaching business with your expertise?

Build on your Strengths

14. Look at your past jobs and analyse what you were really good at.Think of industries and types of businesses that would allow you to use your skills and strengths. For example, if you were really good at writing blog posts in your past marketing job, you could start a business as a freelance writer.

15. Think of businesses and industries that you would have an unfair advantage in. This could be based on extensive industry experience, knowledge, skills or network. How could you use this advantage to build a business?

Become an Idea Machine

16. Train your brain to come up with ideas on tap by writing down 10 ideas about one topic every day. They don’t need to be business ideas but they need to be related to just one topic. This will force your brain to get really creative. For example: write down 10 ideas to make cooking easier, 10 ideas to loose weight, 10 ideas to sell books, etc.

17. Read, Read, Read. The more you read about different things in all sorts of areas, the more ideas will come to you naturally. By expanding your knowledge, you are expanding your realm of business ideas.

Apply a well-known business model to a different industry or product

18. Build the Uber for X, the Airbnb for Y or the Warby Parker for x. You get the point.

19. Find a niche and resell products on your own dropshipping store, Amazon, eBay or other market places

هل تبحث عن #فكرة_عمل؟  توقف عن غوغل "#أفكار_الأعمال" وابدأ في إتقان عملية #توليد_الأفكار نفسها.

 أحد أفضل الطرق لتوليد تدفق ثابت للأفكار الجديدة هو الاقتراب منها من العديد من الزوايا المختلفة التي يمكنك التفكير فيها.

 هل تحتاج إلى بعض الإلهام؟  فيما يلي قائمة بزوايا مختلفة بما في ذلك استراتيجيات توليد الأفكار المحددة لكل واحدة لتدفق العصائر الإبداعية الخاصة بك!

 حك الخدش الخاص بك

 ابتكر حلاً لشيء تجده مزعجًا أو مؤلمًا حقًا في حياتك.

 إنشاء حل أفضل لشيء تقوم به كل يوم - على سبيل المثال  جعل العملية أكثر كفاءة وأقل تكلفة أو أكثر متعة.

 حل مشكلة للجمهور المتخصص

 3. أنشئ قائمة بريد إلكتروني حول موضوع متخصص واستطلعهم حول أكبر التحديات التي تواجههم.

 4. تحليل النشاط في المنتديات المتخصصة وعلى منصات مثل Quora و Reddit لاكتشاف نقاط ورغبات مجموعات المتخصصة.

 اكتشف أفكار الأعمال في عملك المؤسسي

 5. انظر إلى العمليات الداخلية للشركة التي تعمل فيها (الموارد البشرية ، المالية والمحاسبة ، التسويق ، الإدارة ، المبيعات ، إلخ): ما هي العمليات التي يمكن أن تكون أكثر كفاءة؟  كيف يمكن تحسينها باستخدام التكنولوجيا؟

 6. انظر إلى الأشخاص الذين يعملون معك: كيف يمكنهم تحسين ما يفعلونه؟  كيف يمكن أن يكونوا أكثر سعادة فيما يفعلون حتى تتمكن الشركة من الحفاظ على موظفيها الأفضل أداءً؟

 7. ابحث عن إمكانات تحسين الخدمة الأساسية للشركة.  كيف يمكن جعل منتجها أو خدمتها أفضل أو أرخص أو أكثر كفاءة؟  فكر في الطرق غير التقليدية التي تفتقدها الشركات الكبيرة بالإضافة إلى أفكار الأعمال التي تستفيد من فرق صغيرة ناشئة رشيقة بدلاً من رأس المال والموارد الكبيرة.

 8. انظر إلى قابلية نقل منتجاتها وعملياتها: كيف يمكن استخدام عملياتها في صناعة مختلفة؟  كيف يمكن جعل منتجاتها في متناول سوق مختلفة تمامًا (على سبيل المثال ، إصدار أرخص وأكثر أساسية في دول العالم الثالث)؟

 9. ابحث عن إمكانات التحسين في سلسلة التوريد الخاصة بها: كيف يمكن جعل عمليات مورديها أو عملائها أكثر كفاءة؟

 تحليل الاتجاهات

 10. انظر إلى الموضوعات الشائعة على مواقع التواصل الاجتماعي مثل Twitter و Reddit و Buzzfeed و YouTube إلخ. هل تتذكر Fidget Spinner؟  إذا كنت قادرًا على الانتقال إلى الموضوعات الشائعة بسرعة كافية عن طريق إنشاء أو إعادة بيع المنتجات أو الخدمات ذات الصلة ، يمكنك إنشاء نشاط تجاري صالح.

 11. كن محدد الاتجاه بنفسك: اقرأ ، اقرأ ، اقرأ.  اختر صناعة وقضاء شهرين في قراءة كل شيء عنها.  افعل ذلك حتى تصل إلى النقطة التي يمكنك من خلالها اكتشاف الاتجاهات القادمة والتنبؤ بها بنفسك.

 اكتشف شغفك

 12. انظر إلى وظائفك السابقة وحلل ما أعجبك / لم يعجبك في دورك.  فكر في الصناعات وأنواع الأعمال التي تتيح لك القيام بالمزيد مما تريد.  على سبيل المثال ، إذا كنت تحب العمل مع أشخاص في وظيفة خدمة العملاء الخاصة بك ، فلماذا لا تبني أعمال تدريب أو استشارات؟

 13. ضع قائمة بالأشياء التي تحب القيام بها وستقوم بها مجانًا.  فكر في كيفية تحويل هذه الأشياء إلى عمل تجاري.  على سبيل المثال ، إذا كنت شغوفًا بالحياة الصحية وقضيت وقت فراغك في البحث عن الوصفات ، وإيجاد طرق جديدة لممارسة الرياضة وقراءة أحدث الاتجاهات الصحية - فلماذا لا تبدأ مدونة أو تدرب الأعمال مع خبرتك؟

 بناء على نقاط القوة الخاصة بك

 14. انظر إلى وظائفك السابقة وقم بتحليل ما أنت جيد فيه حقًا ، فكر في الصناعات وأنواع الشركات التي تسمح لك باستخدام مهاراتك ونقاط قوتك.  على سبيل المثال ، إذا كنت جيدًا حقًا في كتابة تدوينات المدونة في وظيفة التسويق السابقة ، فيمكنك بدء عمل تجاري ككاتب مستقل.

 15. فكر في الأعمال والصناعات التي ستحصل على ميزة غير عادلة فيها. يمكن أن يعتمد ذلك على خبرة الصناعة الواسعة أو المعرفة أو المهارات أو الشبكة.  كيف يمكنك استخدام هذه الميزة لبناء الأعمال التجارية؟

 كن آلة فكرة

 16. درب عقلك على الخروج بأفكار من خلال كتابة 10 أفكار حول موضوع واحد كل يوم.  لا يلزم أن تكون أفكارًا تجارية ، لكن يجب أن تكون مرتبطة بموضوع واحد فقط.  سيجبر هذا عقلك على الإبداع حقًا.  على سبيل المثال: اكتب 10 أفكار لتسهيل الطهي ، و 10 أفكار لتخفيف الوزن ، و 10 أفكار لبيع الكتب ، إلخ.

 17. اقرأ ، اقرأ ، اقرأ.  كلما قرأت أكثر عن أشياء مختلفة في جميع أنواع المجالات ، ستأتي إليك المزيد من الأفكار بشكل طبيعي.  من خلال توسيع معرفتك ، تقوم بتوسيع نطاق أفكار الأعمال الخاصة بك.

 تطبيق نموذج عمل معروف على صناعة أو منتج مختلف

 18. قم ببناء Uber لـ X أو Airbnb لـ Y أو Warby Parker لـ x.  تحصل على هذه النقطة.

 19. العثور على المنتجات المتخصصة وبيعها في متجر دروبشيبينغ الخاص بك ، أو أمازون ، أو eBay أو غيرها من أماكن السوق

Restaurant catering is needed for the fashion show. Restaurant to deliver food is needed for the fashion show's ongoing collaboration. We will have over 120 models and 9 designers and media crew. Everyone needs to eat at the event from 10 am to 7pm. The way we want to structure the deal is a 10 percent discount for the order for everyone as a group deal and 15 percent fee to the producer for arranging and promoting the restaurant. We can also do some pictures and videos of our models eating the food and with the restaurant's logo and perhaps some testimonials by models and crew for the restaurants. We do shows every month and look for ongoing collaboration. The plan is that some of the production team will call the restaurant and place orders for what they want and with our code you will know to charge them less and deliver group packages. Thank you. We would like to have delivery at 12 noon and at 5 pm. Show takes place in midtown Manhattan but we can do delivery from Brooklyn or Queens or Bronx and even from NJ as long as it makes sense for you as well driving to the city. One of the shows is kids show, so if you have a kids menu that is a plus. You will get great images with amazing models and viral videos that would look great on your tiktok. One of the shows is a bridal fashion show, so you can get a few pictures with gorgeous brides (models) and your food and your logo. We can also do product placement photography for your food and proper food photography as well. Also in the show we do have dogs so that is also an additional distinct factor. Dogs often provide hire visibility to products they correlate with. The show producer often does photography and video for weddings, birthdays and various events and can refer you to catering for those events as well. Makes sense, right. We will have various models with different looks, Caucasian, Asians, person of color, etc. Some of our crew is vegan, if you have a vegan menu that is a plus. Some of our models are actors also, can produce popular skits. We also have a few male designers in the show so it's not only female talent but also male talent. We can promote your restaurant also on our 700 facebook pages with over 300000 real followers. We also have smoke that we can use to improve the quality of the picture to make it look fresher. We also have special backgrounds for food photography and tripods that film upside down and sliders to film food. We also have plastic ice cubes to film cold food. And we have lazy Susie to rotate the food. If you have a liquor license for the event that would be great, otherwise tea and coffee and juices and water will be fine. We also have a magazine that we print and publish online, it would be great if your food and logo can get into the magazine as well. Many of our crew members live in the tri state area and can become patrons for your food if they like it and brand ambassadors.  We have many influencers on our crew, so hopefully if they post images with your food on their social media that can be also a boost for you. Please email at mistergreatproducer@gmail.com or instagram @alexanderegurman thank you. Perhaps we can ask our crew to shout your restaurant name with a large group of our models as appreciation, that also can be a great clip addition for your brand. We want only licensed and insured restaurants, we do not want anyone to get sick because of food. The food has to be well packaged and delivered on time, because we have a schedule to uphold. You would probably need a card to bring it because it is some walking distance from the place where you will be able to leave the car. Let us know if you make salads and have sweet items on your menu please. Eventually we want to do a restaurant fashion show. You can see our prior productions at www.facebook.com/Greatfashionmodel/ You can see our prior shows at www.youtube.com/FashionAndModeling/please tell us what kind of food you cook. Please send us your menu and anything we need to know about your catering service. We can also record an interview with the restaurant owner with our models in the background.  We expect that a substantial number of our crew members will place orders with us. We expect to have a few media outlets covering the show and hopefully your food and logo can get in the publication as well. Perhaps it would be a good idea to go to your restaurant first and eat the food to see if we like it, of course me as producer will pay for the food. Just to see if the food tastes good before ordering for everyone.

Fashion designer headliner is needed. Fee to designer $3000.00 for the show in April. Please reach out @alexanderegurman thank you. We want designer who attracts media attention. We will have 10 new designer who pay to be in the show and need one who gets paid and will help to elevate other designers. Message De Mon Amie , Je Compte Sur Vous Pour Le Partager  ♥️ جزاكم الله كل خير 
J’ai besoin de votre aide pour mon frère. 
Je vous explique la situation mon frère est tétraplégique ( handicapé à 100% , IMC «  infirmité motrice cérébral «  ) 
Il ne peut même pas s’asseoir dans un fauteuil sauf à l’aide de deux personnes 
Son état de santé ne lui permet pas de se mettre à l’aise dedans 
On a découvert cette semaine qu’il est atteint d’une tumeur testiculaire dont une intervention chirurgicale est demandée d’être faite dans les plus brefs délais 
C’est une extrême urgence 
Pour son déplacement il nous faut de l’aide  car avant et après opération il aura besoin d’un chariot roulant 
Et surtout lors de sa sortie de l’hôpital 
Car ça sera quasiment impossible qu’il puisse se mettre dans une chaise 
L’intervention aura lieu ce lundi matin 
Si vous voulez que je prenne des photos des documents nécessaires dites le moi s’il vous plaît 
Si vous aurez aussi besoin de mon numéro je vous le passerai . Merci

هو العائد مقابل ما تنفقه على الإعلانات.
كلما ارتفع، زادت أرباحك.
 شاهد الآن وتعلّم أكثر👉

🎯 هل تعرف ما هو Hook Rate؟
هو نسبة الأشخاص الذين توقّفوا لمشاهدة أول ثوانٍ من إعلانك.
كلما كان أقوى، زادت فرص نجاح حملتك.
👉 شاهد الآن وتعلّم أكثر.

🔁 Repetition ليست مجرد رقم!
تعرّف على تأثير تكرار الإعلان على جمهورك.
👉 شاهد الفيديو الآن.

هل تريد انتشارًا أوسع؟🚀
افهم مؤشر Reach وطبّقه بذكاء
لزيادة انتشارك.
 شاهد الآن وتعلّم أكثر.👉

تعرّف على معدل النقر وكيف يؤثر على أداء إعلاناتك الرقمية.
👉 شاهد الفيديو الآن وتعلّم أكثر.

📊 هل تعرف ما هو CPA؟
اكتشف معناه وكيف يؤثر مباشرة على نجاح حملاتك الإعلانية.
👉 تابع الفيديو وتعلّم خطوة بخطوة.

هل تعرف ما هي Impression 👁️ ولماذا تعتبر مهمة في حملاتك الإعلانية 📢؟
في هذا الفيديو ، نشرح لك معنى الظهور (Impression) وكيفية قياس مدى وصول إعلانك للجمهور 🌍 بدون الحاجة لمضاعفة الميزانية 💸.
شاهد الفيديو الآن ▶️ وابدأ تحليل أداء حملاتك على Ayor اليوم 🚀!

هل تعرف ما هو CPM 💰 ولماذا يعتبر مهم في حملاتك الإعلانية 📢؟
في هذا الفيديو 🎥، نشرح لك معنى تكلفة الألف ظهور وكيفية التحكم في ميزانيتك 💸 للوصول لأكبر جمهور ممكن 🌍 بدون زيادة التكاليف.
شاهد الفيديو الآن ▶️ وابدأ تحسين حملاتك على Ayor اليوم 🚀

💡 KPI ليست مجرد أرقام!
تعرف على CPM, CPA, CTR وغيرها من المؤشرات المهمة التي ستغيّر طريقة إدارتك لحملاتك الرقمية.
👉 شاهد السلسلة كاملة وابدأ التطوير الآن.

🔥 مشروعك يستاهل منصة قوية
Ayor يخليك تبيع أونلاين بثقة
واجهة سهلة، أدوات ذكية
والباقي علينا 😉

🚀 ابدأ اليوم واصنع متجرك مع Ayor plus court

تسعير منتجاتك ما يكونش عشوائي بعد اليوم!
مع **AI Pricing** من Ayor، الذكاء الاصطناعي يعطيك أفضل سعر يضمن الربح ويقارن لك بالسوق والمنافسين في ثواني.
خليه يخدم عليك… وركّز أنت على البيع. ⚡🔥

✨جرب Ayor الآن وخلي الذكاء الاصطناعي يزيد من أرباحك!

🎉 2025 كان سنة مذهلة مع Ayor!

🛒 إنشاء أكثر من 17 ألف قمع مبيعات
🌐 أكثر من 40 مليون زائر لمتاجرنا
شكرًا لكل مستخدمينا على الثقة 💛
هل تريد أن يكون متجرك التالي من قصص النجاح؟ ابدأ مع Ayor الآن 🚀

سبب خروج إسراء بيلجيتش من مسلسل قيامة أرطغرل هو أن المؤلف والمخرج   قراروا  تغيير الأحداث في الموسم الخامس  وليس لأن زوجها طلب منها كذلك 😒😒
حتى هي أعلنت بكده على موقعها على موقع التواصل إلاجتماعي إنستجرام 
والمنتج محمد بوذاغ أيضاً أعلن أن سبب خروجها هو أنه أراد تغيير الأحداث في الموسم الخامس حتى تبدأ ملامح الدولة العثمانية. 
هي بعد خروجها من المسلسل مثلت مسلسل تانى إسمه أمل واحد لايكفى لكن لم يحقق النجاح المطلوب وتوقف.... 
هي مش أنسحبت تم إنهاء دورها مثل أى ممثل شارك وتم إنهاء دوره وفقاً للسيناريو و رأي الكاتب محمد بوذادغ.
الرقم واحد ❤🔥
تفوقت وتطورت كثيرا عن الموسم الاول سواء في الشكل او التمثيل الان اصبحت اراك عثمان وليس بوراك ❤❤
